parameters.query: SELECT id FROM leads WHERE email = $1 LIMIT 1;

WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO leads (email, first_name, last_name, phone, source_channel, lead_stage, lead_score, created_at)
  VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'engaged', 5, $6)
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO lead_interactions (lead_id, interaction_type, message_text, interaction_metadata, created_at)
SELECT id, 'dm', $7, $8, NOW() FROM inserted;

additionalFields.queryParams:
={{ JSON.stringify([

  $node['Transform - Normalize Lead'].json.message_text,

]) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details)
VALUES ('lead_capture', 'lead', 'webhook', 'system', 'success', $1);

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details)
VALUES ('lead_capture', 'lead', 'webhook', 'system', 'error', $1);
